title: Apollo 与 Blackstone 联手 350 亿美元 AI 融资交易
full_text:
Jun 9th, 2026
Apollo, Blackstone Fund AI Boom
Apollo and Blackstone are teaming up on a massive $35 billion AI financing deal that could reshape how artificial intelligence infrastructure gets funded. Bloomberg’s Emily Graffeo joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why Wall Street is creating new financing models for expensive AI chips, how Anthropic and Broadcom fit into the deal, and why this could be the beginning of an entirely new AI investment category.
Duration: 1:32
Key Takeaways From Apple's WWDC 2026 Event
Duration: 5:13
Will Billionaires Really Flee a California Wealth Tax?
Duration: 10:48
IBM CEO Krishna on Quantum Advantage, Profit Strategy
Duration: 3:03
SpaceX IPO 'Watershed' Moment for Markets, Says Ives
Duration: 1:00
Sam Bankman-Fried Wants Trump to Pardon Him
Bloomberg Crypto
Duration: 3:48
US Existing-Home Sales Rise to Fastest Pace of the Year
Duration: 8:01
JPMorgan Strategist Expects CPI Above 4%
Duration: 1:42
AI Earnings Durability Is in Focus for BlackRock’s Wei Li
Bloomberg Brief

discovery_record.discovery_title: Apollo 与 Blackstone 联手 350 亿美元 AI 融资交易
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Apollo 和 Blackstone 合作开展 350 亿美元 AI 融资交易，可能重塑人工智能基础设施的融资方式。华尔街正为昂贵的 AI 芯片创建新的融资模型，Anthropic 和 Broadcom 参与其中。这笔交易可能标志着一个全新 AI 投资类别的开端。

Bloomberg’s Emily Graffeo joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why Wall Street is creating new financing models for expensive AI chips, how Anthropic and Broadcom fit into the deal, and why this could be the beginning of an entirely new AI investment category.
